allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('peerDeps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('breaking changes link:', d.get\('homepage',''\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); majors={}; [majors.setdefault\(v.split\('.'\)[0], []\).append\(v\) for v in vs]; print\('v2 latest:', majors.get\('2',['none']\)[-1]\); print\('v3 latest:', majors.get\('3',['none']\)[-1]\)")
